SessionStart.command: echo "=== Session Context ==="; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo')"; echo "Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"; echo "========================"

PostToolUse.suffix: [OUTPUT TRUNCATED — use more specific commands to see less output]

_comment: هذا الملف يوفر 60-90% من التوكنز على مخرجات الأدوات. انسخه إلى .claude/settings.json
